portfolio.title: Otten Coffee | Web
portfolio.description: Indonesia's leading specialty coffee e-commerce platform serving premium coffee experiences nationwide. Built with modern web technologies to deliver seamless shopping experiences for coffee enthusiasts, featuring comprehensive product catalogs, advanced filtering systems, and integrated payment solutions. Supports over 180 team members across four major Indonesian cities.

portfolio.title: Lemonilo | Web
portfolio.description: Revolutionary healthy food e-commerce platform transforming Indonesia's natural food industry. Developed a comprehensive web application featuring 40+ organic product SKUs including innovative instant noodles made from cassava flour and spinach puree. Built with focus on user experience, product discovery, and educational content about healthy living without artificial preservatives.

portfolio.title: Indera Agri | Web
portfolio.description: Comprehensive agricultural technology platform revolutionizing Indonesia's farming ecosystem. Developed digital solutions connecting farmers directly with buyers while implementing sustainable farming practices. Features include supply chain optimization, crop management tools, and marketplace integration for enhanced agricultural productivity.

portfolio.title: BonApp | Web
portfolio.description: Full-stack food delivery platform serving Indonesian metropolitan areas with advanced restaurant management capabilities. Built comprehensive web application featuring real-time order tracking, integrated payment systems, restaurant dashboard management, and logistics optimization for efficient food delivery operations.

portfolio.title: Flock Asia | Web
portfolio.description: Cutting-edge fintech platform delivering innovative digital financial services across Southeast Asia. Developed scalable web applications focusing on payment processing, digital banking interfaces, and financial inclusion tools. Features advanced security implementations and seamless user experiences for underserved financial markets.

portfolio.title: Solusi Ringkas | Web
portfolio.description: Enterprise-grade business automation platform designed for Indonesian SMEs. Created streamlined digital tools featuring process automation, workflow management, and business intelligence dashboards. Developed with modern web frameworks to simplify complex business operations through intuitive user interfaces.

portfolio.title: Senduh | Web
portfolio.description: Innovative digital invitation platform transforming event management in Indonesia. Built feature-rich web application offering free customizable online invitations with QR code integration, guest management systems, and real-time attendance tracking. Designed with responsive layouts and intuitive creation tools for seamless event coordination.

portfolio.title: GajiCermat | Web
portfolio.description: Advanced HR and payroll management platform tailored for Indonesian businesses. Developed comprehensive web application featuring automated payroll processing, employee management systems, attendance tracking, and HR analytics dashboards. Built with secure data handling and compliance features for streamlined workforce management.

portfolio.title: Bento Kopi | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Modern coffee ordering mobile application designed for Bento Kopi chain stores. Developed native mobile app featuring menu browsing, customization options, loyalty programs, and integrated payment systems. Built with real-time order tracking and push notifications for enhanced customer experience.

portfolio.title: BonApp Merchant | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Comprehensive point-of-sale mobile application for restaurant merchants. Developed B2B solution featuring order management, inventory tracking, sales analytics, and payment processing. Built with offline capabilities and cloud synchronization for reliable restaurant operations management.

portfolio.title: Boslelang | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Dynamic auction-based e-commerce mobile application connecting buyers and sellers through competitive bidding. Developed with real-time bidding systems, secure payment integration, and comprehensive product catalog management. Features include bid notifications, auction timers, and user verification systems.

portfolio.title: DGW Group | UI/UX
portfolio.description: Agricultural supply chain mobile application serving Indonesian farmers with quality farming components. Developed comprehensive platform featuring product catalogs, order management, delivery tracking, and agricultural education resources. Built to support farmers in achieving superior and abundant harvest results through quality agricultural inputs.

portfolio.title: Flock Social Trading | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Advanced social trading mobile application enabling copy trading functionality for financial markets. Built sophisticated platform featuring real-time market data, trader performance analytics, social networking capabilities, and automated copy trading systems. Designed with risk management tools and portfolio tracking features.

portfolio.title: Kerja Cermat | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Employee-focused payroll management mobile application streamlining workforce financial operations. Developed user-friendly app featuring salary tracking, attendance management, leave requests, and financial reports. Built with secure authentication and real-time synchronization for reliable employee self-service functionality.

portfolio.title: Lemonilo | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Health-focused e-commerce mobile application for organic and natural food products. Developed comprehensive shopping experience featuring product discovery, nutritional information, personalized recommendations, and seamless checkout processes. Built with educational content and community features promoting healthy lifestyle choices.

portfolio.title: Otomoto | Web
portfolio.description: Advanced motorcycle inspection system web application for comprehensive vehicle assessment. Built with photo documentation, damage assessment tools, and integration capabilities for efficient vehicle inspection processes.

portfolio.title: Pertamina Balongan | Web
portfolio.description: Machine learning-powered CCTV monitoring system for industrial facility security and safety. portfolio.title: PrintArt | Web
portfolio.description: Comprehensive ERP system specifically designed for printing industry operations. portfolio.title: Salzi | Mobile App
portfolio.description: Customer ordering system mobile application designed for small and medium enterprises in Depok City. portfolio.title: XO Indonesia | Web
